# In Process

> A timeline for artists. It includes a protocol, an API, and multiple front-end clients including Web, Telegram, and SMS.

In Process is a living archive of artistic evolution where artists, builders, and creatives can upload their work-in-progress and mint it onchain to a collective timeline. Your community, fans, and patrons can collect, comment, and support work as it unfolds.

## What Makes In Process Different

- Focus on process, not polish
- Permanent, onchain documentation
- Monetization of in-progress work
- Decentralized, artist-owned timelines
- Support for both Web2 and Web3 users
- Cross-platform embedding of content (onchain + offchain)

## What Content Can You Post

You can upload any part of your creative process:
- Journals, notes, poetry
- Demos, drafts, audio clips
- Sketches, moodboards, visuals
- Behind-the-scenes footage, vlogs
- External links and embeds (YouTube, NFTs, Instagram, Google Docs, etc.)

## Timeline Features

- Moments can be backdated (e.g., a sketch from 2021)
- Moments can be future-dated (e.g., a concept for a 2026 project)
- Moments can be time-stamped to the present
- Your personal timeline feeds into the Collective Timeline

## The Collective Timeline

A shared feed where everyone's onchain creative process lives side-by-side. It's a decentralized, living archive of artistic culture across disciplines and styles.

## Who Is In Process For

- Artists (music, visual, literary, film)
- Builders and developers
- Web2 creatives transitioning into Web3
- Fans, patrons, and explorers who want to support artistic journeys

## How Monetization Works

- Set a price per moment (in crypto or USD)
- Collectors pay to own and support your process
- Proceeds go directly to your wallet

## Technology Stack

- Base: Fast, affordable L2 blockchain (Chain ID: 8453)
- Zora Protocol: For minting and managing moments (ERC-1155)
- Auth: Privy-backed email OTP login and API key flows are supported
- Arweave: Permanent decentralized storage for media and metadata
- Payments: Crypto payments are supported; card checkout depends on your client-side provider integration

## Links

- Website: https://inprocess.world
- Documentation: https://docs.inprocess.world
- FAQ: https://inprocess.world/faq

---

## Building a Custom Web Client on In Process

### Official Sources (Preferred)

- Reference client repository: https://github.com/homebasedotlove/inprocess-client
- Public docs site: https://docs.inprocess.world
- Web client repository: https://github.com/sweetmantech/in_process
- API repository: https://github.com/sweetmantech/In-Process-API
- API reference: https://docs.inprocess.world/api-reference

### Step 1: Understand Product and Terminology

Use **moment/moments** terminology and align UX with the public app.
- Primary docs: https://docs.inprocess.world
- Product/UI reference: https://github.com/sweetmantech/in_process/blob/main/README.md
- App shell + metadata reference: https://github.com/sweetmantech/in_process/blob/main/app/layout.tsx
- Reference client README: https://github.com/homebasedotlove/inprocess-client/blob/main/README.md

### Step 2: Set Up Auth Strategy

Choose authentication UX (Privy-backed email OTP, wallet-native, or hybrid) based on your audience.
- Primary docs: https://docs.inprocess.world/oauth/login-with-otp
- Example wallet provider setup: https://github.com/kismetcasa/KismetArt/blob/main/providers/WagmiProvider.tsx
- Example wagmi config: https://github.com/kismetcasa/KismetArt/blob/main/lib/wagmi.ts
- Example app-level provider wiring: https://github.com/kismetcasa/KismetArt/blob/main/app/layout.tsx

### Step 3: Connect to Timeline Data

Implement timeline browsing from the public API and map response to your feed UI.
- Primary docs: https://docs.inprocess.world/api-reference/timeline
- Example artist client (built from docs): https://github.com/kismetcasa/KismetArt
- Example timeline API proxy route: https://github.com/kismetcasa/KismetArt/blob/main/app/api/timeline/route.ts
- Example timeline page usage: https://github.com/kismetcasa/KismetArt/blob/main/app/page.tsx
- Example shared In Process helpers/types: https://github.com/kismetcasa/KismetArt/blob/main/lib/inprocess.ts

### Step 4: Render Moment Detail

Show moment metadata, media, artist, and pricing/sale state from API responses.
- Primary docs: https://docs.inprocess.world/api-reference/moment/get
- Example moment API proxy route: https://github.com/kismetcasa/KismetArt/blob/main/app/api/moment/route.ts
- Example moment card UI: https://github.com/kismetcasa/KismetArt/blob/main/components/MomentCard.tsx

### Step 5: Implement Wallet/Collection Context

Prepare user wallet/account context and collection context before collect/create actions.
- Primary docs: https://docs.inprocess.world/api-reference/introduction
- Example navigation/context entrypoint: https://github.com/kismetcasa/KismetArt/blob/main/components/Nav.tsx
- Example app routing entrypoint: https://github.com/kismetcasa/KismetArt/blob/main/app/page.tsx

### Step 6: Implement Collect + Upload + Create Flow

Finish the minimum production flow: collect an existing moment, upload media/metadata, then create a new moment.
- Collect docs: https://docs.inprocess.world/api-reference/moment/collect
- Upload docs: https://docs.inprocess.world/arweave/upload-to-arweave
- Create docs: https://docs.inprocess.world/api-reference/moment/create
- Sales config docs: https://docs.inprocess.world/configuration/sales-config
- Example collect API proxy route: https://github.com/kismetcasa/KismetArt/blob/main/app/api/collect/route.ts
- Example upload API proxy route: https://github.com/kismetcasa/KismetArt/blob/main/app/api/upload/route.ts
- Example create API proxy route: https://github.com/kismetcasa/KismetArt/blob/main/app/api/mint/route.ts
- Example mint form component: https://github.com/kismetcasa/KismetArt/blob/main/components/MintForm.tsx
